markdown:
#  Drawings (iOS) 
Table of Contents 
##  Permissions 
Learn which user permissions are required to take the described actions in this tool. 
#####  Important
Some actions that impact this tool are done in other Procore tools. 
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take the action with this permission level.
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take this action with this permission level AND one or more additional requirements, like [granular permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-permissions-in-procore-and-how-do-they-work).   
| Access Recently Viewed Drawings   
[](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/access-recently-viewed-drawings-ios) [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/view-drawings-android)  |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Add Measurements to a Drawing   
[](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/add-measurements-to-a-drawing-ios) [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/add-measurements-to-a-drawing-android)  |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | This item can be viewed or edited in offline mode provided that the item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device.  |  
| Add Observations to a Drawing   
[](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/add-observations-to-a-drawing-ios) [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/add-observations-to-a-drawing-android)  |   |   | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users must also have 'Standard' permissions or higher on the project's Observations tool.  |  
| Add Photos to a Drawing   
[](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/add-photos-to-a-drawing-ios) [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/add-photos-to-a-drawing-android)  |   | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 
  * Users must also have 'Read Only' permissions or higher on the project's Photos tool.
  * This item can be viewed or edited in offline mode provided that the item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device.

 |  
| Add Punch List Items to Drawings   
[](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/add-punch-list-items-to-a-drawing-ios) [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/add-punch-list-items-to-a-drawing-android)  |   |   | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 
  * Users must also have 'Standard' permissions or higher on the project's Punch List tool.
  * This item can be viewed or edited in offline mode provided that the item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device.

 |  
| Compare Drawings   
[](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/compare-drawings-ios) [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/compare-drawings-android)  |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |

  * Users must also have 'Read Only' permissions or higher on the project's Correspondence tool.
  * This action can be performed offline. Tasks performed offline are synced with Procore once a network connection has been reestablished.

title: Permissions
description: This page lists the user permissions that are required to perform actions in or related to the project's Drawings tool on the Procore iOS app.
